source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder contains 0.5 kg of water at 200 kPa, 300\circ\text{C}, and it now cools to 15\circ\text{C} in an isobaric process. The heat goes into a heat engine that rejects heat to the ambient at 25\circ\text{C} and the whole process is assumed to be reversible. Find the work given out by the heat engine.

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: A piston/cylinder contains 0.5 kg of water at 200 kPa, 300\circ\text{C}, and it now cools to 15\circ\text{C} in an isobaric process. The heat goes into a heat engine that rejects heat to the ambient at 25\circ\text{C} and the whole process is assumed to be reversible. Find the work given out by the heat engine.
